global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting travel booking options at an attractive price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background pattern
elements.description: An abstract background pattern with geometric shapes in warm orange tones.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Layered geometric shapes in varying sizes and shades of orange, creating depth.

elements.label: Top overlay
elements.description: A soft, rounded shape at the top, blending into the background.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Dream destinations await' centered in the ad.

elements.label: Booking options
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message, reading 'Flexible booking options'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A prominent white text displaying the price '€19.99' beneath the booking options.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold button with the text 'Try for free' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner, labeled 'CloudRoute' in a simple font.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small label in the top area indicating 'UGC', suggesting user-generated content.

elements.label: Bottom area
elements.description: A large area at the bottom of the ad, primarily for text and CTA.
elements.text_content: destinations await Flexible booking options €19.99 Try for free

elements.label: Dream headline
elements.description: A small, elegant text reading 'Dream' positioned above the main message.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner, labeled 'CloudRoute' in a simple font.

elements.label: User-generated content label
elements.description: A small label indicating 'UGC', suggesting user-generated content.
